tagline: Thorough, no-obligation roof assessment with a written report.
metaDescription: Free roof inspections across Los Angeles County. Written report, photo documentation, and honest life-expectancy estimate. CA Lic. #1109337.
intro: A proper roof inspection tells you three things: (1) how much life your current roof has left, (2) whether any repairs are needed now, and (3) what options make sense if a replacement is coming. Palm Crest Roofing does free, no-obligation inspections across all of Los Angeles County — and if your roof is fine, we'll tell you.
benefits: Full exterior roof walk-through (when safely accessible)
Attic inspection for leaks, ventilation, and insulation
Written report with honest life-expectancy estimate

process.title: Schedule
process.desc: Call 818.252.9422 or request online. We usually have slots within a few days.

process.title: Exterior Inspection
process.desc: Our inspector walks the roof (when safe), checks shingles/tiles, flashings, valleys, penetrations, and gutters.

process.title: Attic Inspection
process.desc: Most leaks show up in the attic before they reach your ceiling — we check for stains, moisture, proper insulation, and ventilation.

process.title: Photo Documentation
process.desc: Every finding is photographed so you can see exactly what we saw.

process.title: Written Report
process.desc: You get a plain-language report with condition, issues found, recommended actions, and pricing if work is needed.

faqs.a: Yes, truly free — no fine print, no hidden fees, no obligation. We earn our living by earning trust first.

faqs.q: Will you try to sell me a new roof?
faqs.a: No. If your roof has another 5–10 years, we'll tell you. We'd rather earn your trust for the replacement years from now than pressure you today.

faqs.q: How long does an inspection take?
faqs.a: Typically 30–60 minutes for residential, longer for large commercial buildings or complex roofs.
